# milvus Provider

The **Milvus** provider enables infrastructure-as-code management of [Milvus](https://milvus.io), an open-source, cloud-native vector database built for storing, indexing, and searching massive datasets of high-dimensional embedding vectors.

Use this provider to declaratively manage Milvus resources — collections, indexes, and aliases — directly from Terraform, making it easy to version-control your vector database schema alongside the rest of your infrastructure.

## Supported Resources

| Resource | Description |
|---|---|
| `milvus_collection` | Manage Milvus collections and their schemas |
| `milvus_index` | Create and manage indexes on collection fields |
| `milvus_alias` | Manage aliases that point to collections |

## Authentication

The provider supports connecting to both self-hosted Milvus clusters and Zilliz Cloud:

- **Address / Username / Password** — for self-hosted Milvus
- **API Key** — for Zilliz Cloud or API-key-enabled deployments
- **TLS** — optionally enable encrypted connections

## Example Usage

```hcl
provider "milvus" {
  address = "localhost:19530"
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `address` (String) The `host:port` address of the Milvus server (e.g. `localhost:19530`). Can also be set via the `MILVUS_ADDRESS` environment variable.
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for Zilliz Cloud or API-key-enabled Milvus deployments. When set, this takes precedence over `username`/`password`. Can also be set via the `MILVUS_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `db_name` (String) The Milvus database to operate on. Defaults to the `default` database when not specified. Can also be set via the `MILVUS_DB_NAME` environment variable.
- `enable_tls` (Boolean) Whether to use TLS when connecting to Milvus. Set to `true` for Zilliz Cloud or any TLS-terminated endpoint. Defaults to `false`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for Milvus authentication. Used together with `username`. Can also be set via the `MILVUS_PASSWORD` environment variable.
- `server_version` (String) Target Milvus server version (e.g. `2.4.0`). When specified, the provider will validate compatibility against this version. Optional — omit to let the provider detect the version automatically.
- `username` (String) Username for Milvus authentication. Required when Milvus is running with authentication enabled. Can also be set via the `MILVUS_USERNAME` environment variable.
